evals.prompt: I need to crawl the entire docs section of https://docs.example.com — only pages under /guide/ path, max 100 pages
evals.expected_output: map_site first, then crawl_site with include_patterns=['/guide/*'], max_pages=100
expectations: Suggests map_site before crawling to understand structure

evals.prompt: Show me all the URLs on https://bigsite.com so I can decide what to crawl
evals.expected_output: Uses map_site to discover URLs without downloading content
expectations: Explains that map_site discovers URLs without content download
Suggests using results to plan a targeted crawl
